---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this plugin
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the plugin doesn't currently support? What's the current workaround, if any?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you thought about, and why you prefer this one.

## Scope

- [ ] Should apply to both the Czech and English variants
- [ ] Only relevant to one variant (please specify which, and why)

## Additional context

Anything else relevant — mockups, links, related issues.
